chapter_title.en: Among the Concise Words of the Messenger of Allah (peace Be Upon him)

text: 5809 - لاَ يَحِلُّ لِلْمُؤْمِنِ أَنْ يَهْجُرَ أَخَاهُ اَلْمُؤْمِنَ فَوْقَ ثَلاَثٍ".

en.bab-ul-qaim-publications:
Hadith.5809 - The Prophet (sw) said;
"It is not permissible for a believer to abandon his believing brother for more than three days."
